scripts.lint: npm run lint:web && npm run lint:api
scripts.lint:api: python -m ruff check apps/api/src apps/api/tests apps/latex-compiler/src apps/latex-compiler/tests
scripts.format: npm run format:web && npm run format:api
scripts.format:check: npm run format:web:check && npm run format:api:check
scripts.format:api: python -m ruff format apps/api/src apps/api/tests apps/latex-compiler/src apps/latex-compiler/tests
scripts.format:api:check: python -m ruff format --check apps/api/src apps/api/tests apps/latex-compiler/src apps/latex-compiler/tests
scripts.verify:fast: npm run changelog:check && npm run format:check && npm run lint:web -- --max-warnings=0 && npm run lint:api && npm run dead-code && git diff --check
scripts.verify:api: npm run format:api:check && npm run lint:api && npm run test:api && npm run test:compiler && git diff --check
scripts.verify:web: npm run changelog:check && npm run format:web:check && npm run lint:web -- --max-warnings=0 && npm run dead-code && npm run test && npm run build && git diff --check
scripts.verify:full: npm run verify:api && npm run verify:web
